name: Porta Cabin
description:
Porta Cabin — Factory-Built, Site-Ready in 7-21 Days

Your project starts in a few weeks. You need a structure on site fast — something that goes up in a day, holds up through the project, and doesn't need babysitting.

That's what SAMAN porta cabins are built for.

We are a porta cabin manufacturer based in Bangalore. MS frame construction. Delivered and erected across South and North India in 7-21 working days. Sizes from 10×10 ft to 20×40 ft. Starting at Rs 2,15,000.

If you're a site contractor, project manager, or construction company sourcing for an active project — you're in the right place.

Sizes and What You Get as Standard

Every porta cabin we supply is built with a mild steel frame, insulated sandwich panel walls, and a single-skin steel roof. Standard fittings on every unit include one door, two windows, internal electrical wiring, and a switchboard.

Porta cabin in India

Size Floor Area Typical Use
10×10 ft 100 sq ft 2–3 person coordination room
10×12 ft 120 sq ft 3–4 person site office
10×20 ft 200 sq ft 5–6 person project office
20×20 ft 400 sq ft Multi-room or combined office + rest area
20×40 ft 800 sq ft Large site accommodation

Need something smaller? Our small portacabin page covers the compact range — exact dimensions, capacity, and what fits inside. Custom sizes are available for non-standard site layouts.

Which Porta Cabin Do You Need?

Most buyers fall into one of these four categories. Find yours and go straight to the right page.

Starting a new project and need a basic site office fast Our low cost porta cabin is the most ordered unit — 10×10 ft MS structure, basic fittings, Rs 2,15,000. Delivered in 7 days.

Running a contractor team of 4–6 people on site The site office porta cabin is built for construction project management — drawing table provision, staff seating, AC-ready. For general office use outside construction, the portacabin office page covers that instead.

Need the smallest possible unit — single person, compact footprint Our mini porta cabin is 6×8 ft. Single door, single person. Not a security cabin — for purpose-built guard posts, see our security guard cabin range.

Sourcing for a premium or long-term installation If the project is long-duration or the office is client-facing, see the luxury porta cabin range for premium interior fit-out options.

How We Deliver to Your Site

External view of porta cabin

  1. Share your requirement — site location, size, number of units, when you need it.
  2. Get a quote in 24 hours — itemized price covering cabin, transport, and erection.
  3. Confirm order — factory dispatch within 5 working days.
  4. Delivery and erection — our team sets up at your site. You arrange a flat surface and power connection. We handle everything else.

Every unit is quality-checked at our Bangalore factory before leaving — structure, panels, fittings, and electrical. If you specifically need a factory-built unit with documented pre-dispatch inspection for procurement compliance, the prefabricated porta cabin page covers that process in detail.

For South India orders, delivery and erection completes within 7 working days of dispatch. For sites outside South India, confirm lead time with us before committing to your project schedule.

Rent or Buy — A Quick Guide

Rent if your project runs under 6 months or you're on a single site. Lower upfront commitment, you return the cabin when the project closes.

Buy if you're running 2 or more concurrent projects, or the project runs 12 months or longer. At that point, purchase cost works out lower than cumulative rent — and the cabin moves with you to the next project.

Ready to purchase? The buy porta cabins page covers stock availability, payment terms, and confirmed lead times.

Porta Cabin Price Range

Porta cabin for toilet purpoe

A standard 10×10 ft MS porta cabin starts at Rs 2,15,000. This covers the cabin, delivery within 200 km of Bangalore, and erection at site.

What moves the price: size, MS frame thickness, additional doors or windows, AC provision, toilet attachment, or premium interior fitout. If you need a cabin with an attached bathroom, a porta cabin with attached toilet starts at Rs 2,65,000 for a 10×12 ft combined unit.

What stays fixed: MS structure, insulated panels, and site erection are included in every quote. No separate transport invoice.

Why Construction Companies Order from SAMAN

500+ projects delivered across highway, infrastructure, and industrial construction sites in Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, and Kerala. For long-duration projects on rough terrain — highway, dam, or industrial sites — contractors consistently specify our steel porta cabin for its heavier frame and resistance to site conditions.

7-day delivery commitment for standard configurations across South India.

After-delivery support — if something isn't right when the cabin arrives, we fix it. Not your problem to sort with a third party.

If your requirement is not construction-specific — retail, residential, or institutional use — we have a separate range for those applications. Browse all cabin types →

Frequently Asked Questions

Porta cabin for office use

What makes a porta cabin the right choice for a construction project?

No foundation, no permanent structure, no lengthy permissions. A porta cabin goes up in a day and comes down just as fast. You get a weatherproof, functional space from day one — and it moves to the next project when this one closes.

How fast can SAMAN deliver a porta cabin to a construction site?

Standard delivery and erection across South India is 7 working days from order confirmation. For custom sizes or configurations, allow 10–12 working days.

Do you supply porta cabins on rent?

Yes. Monthly rental is available for standard sizes. Send us your site location and project duration for a rental quote.

Can a porta cabin be relocated to a different site after the project ends?

Yes. You need a crane or flatbed truck for the move. Most contractors shift the same cabin 3 to 5 times over its life. We can help arrange transport when you're ready.

Do porta cabins come with electrical fittings included?

Every unit includes internal wiring, a switchboard, and light fixtures as standard. AC connection points are available on request. You connect to your site's power source — we supply everything inside.

How long does a porta cabin last?

A well-maintained porta cabin lasts 10 to 15 years. The MS frame holds up without structural repairs across multiple projects and sites.

Get a quote in 24 hours.

Call or WhatsApp us with your site location, size requirement, and delivery date. We'll send you a clear, itemized price.

Request a free quote → or call us at 09708989937
